title: [FIRRTL] infer width (asUInt)
body:
The following FIRRTL program:

```python
circuit top_mod :
  module top_mod :
    output tmp35: UInt<13>
    tmp35 <= asUInt(UInt("h1c39"))
```

Compiled with `firtool a_top_mod.fir --lower-to-hw --lower-types --expand-whens --infer-widths --lowering-options=noAlwaysFF --verilog -o=a_top_mod_new.v` fails with the following error:

```
a_top_mod.fir:4:11: error: destination width 13 is not greater than or equal to source width 16
    tmp35 <= asUInt(UInt("h1c39"))
          ^
a_top_mod.fir:4:11: note: see current operation: "firrtl.connect"(%tmp35, %c7225_ui16) : (!firrtl.uint<13>, !firrtl.uint<16>) -> ()
```

Compiled with `firrtl-1.5-SNAPSHOT` produces this Verilog:

```verilog
module top_mod(
  output [12:0] tmp35
);
  assign tmp35 = 13'h1c39;
endmodule
```
